headline: Stocks To Watch Amid The First Trump Vs. Biden Presidential Debate
summary: The first of three scheduled presidential debates ahead of the 2020 election will be held Tuesday evening at 9 p.m. ET as U.S President Donald Trump goes up against former Vice President Joe Biden. The two will debate for 90 minutes in a commercial-free broadcast across several TV stations.

headline: Study: 49% Of World's Students Facing Partial Or Total School Closures
summary: UNESCO’s global monitoring of school closures caused by the COVID-19 pandemic reveals that over 850,000,000 learners, or 48.6% of total enrolled learners globally, are facing intermittent or total school closures in September 2020.

headline: Peter Thiel's Valar Venture Leads $52M Funding Round For European Cryptocurrency Brokerage
summary:
Billionaire Peter Thiel-backed Valar Ventures emerged as the lead investor in Vienna-based digital investment platform Bitpanda.

What Happened: The platform secured $52 million in Series A funding led by Valar and other investors including Speedinvest, the cryptocurrency brokerage said in a statement Tuesday.

headline: Elon Musk Has IPO Plans For Starlink, And Retail Investors Will Get 'Top Priority'
